summary: Gruber announces a new self-service feature for Daring Fireball members to retrieve lost membership keys used for accessing members-only RSS feeds. Members can enter their email address to have key information resent. He notes that most cases of 'missing' keys are likely due to spam filters catching the original confirmation emails. He provides practical guidance on whitelisting the support email address.
key_points: A self-service membership key retrieval system has been added for Daring Fireball members
Membership keys are required for accessing members-only RSS feeds
Most missing key complaints are likely caused by spam filters flagging confirmation emails
PayPal orders are processed automatically while eSellerate orders require manual processing
money_quotes: My guess is that in the cases where members 'never got' their keys, overzealous spam filters mis-flagged the messages containing the membership confirmation and key information.
key_insight: A simple self-service tool for key retrieval solves both the user frustration of lost membership keys and the support burden of manually handling retrieval requests.
